name: Sydney Fox and Dingo Rescue
summary: Rescue organisation focused on foxes and dingoes in need of care and protection.
description: Relevant for the 1080 to Zero campaign, dingo policy, fox welfare and public education about targeted animals.
alignment: Listed because direct rescue experience can sharpen campaigns about poison, coexistence and humane transition.
